mnemonic: newspaper [ньюспе'йпе] газета - По смыслу слов news и paper.

examples.eng: It was in some newspaper.
Did you see today's newspaper?
He likes reading the newspaper.
Murdoch owns many newspapers
Hand me the newspaper, please.
He works for a local newspaper.
The newspaper lay on the table.
Have you read today's newspaper?
He sued the newspaper for libel.
examples.ru: Он подал в суд на газету за клевету.

examples.eng: He read his newspaper at breakfast.
He used some newspaper to get the fire started.
examples.ru: Он использовал газету, чтобы развести огонь.

examples.eng: a past editor of the newspaper
I always buy a daily newspaper.
Frank tossed her the newspaper.
the inside pages of the newspaper
The newspaper is published daily.
The newspaper carries the article.
I saw your advert in the newspaper.
examples.ru: Я видел ваше объявление в газете.

examples.eng: She reminded me to buy a newspaper.
examples.ru: Она напомнила мне, чтобы я купил газету.

examples.eng: These reptiles publish a newspaper.
She quoted from a newspaper article.
Have you finished with the newspaper?
I read her obituary in the newspaper.
examples.ru: Я читал ее некролог в газете.

examples.eng: He had the newspaper right in his hand.
examples.ru: Он держал эту газету прямо в руках.

examples.eng: He perused the newspaper over breakfast.
examples.ru: За завтраком он внимательно просмотрел газету.

examples.eng: She had read about it in the newspapers.
examples.ru: Она уже прочла об этом в газетах.

examples.eng: That dog has torn up my newspaper again.
I will paragraph you in every newspaper.
examples.ru: Я напишу о вас во всех газетах.

examples.eng: The newspaper was spread across his lap.
examples.ru: Газета была разостлана у него на коленях.

examples.eng: The story in the newspaper is incorrect.
